title: selaginella tenera var. macraei
intro: Selaginella tenera var. macraei, also known as Macraei Spikemoss, is a species of flowering plant in the family Selaginellaceae, belonging to the spikemoss genus. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections, making it a popular choice for treating various health conditions. Selaginella tenera var. macraei is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, and can also be dried and used in capsule or powder form.
